links.source_location: Both are read-only audit agents that analyze the same codebase from different lenses
What to actually check - Security logging
Project conventions - No DI / no interfaces
Both express the same 'manual over framework' philosophy - avoid DI containers and validators in favor of explicit hand-written code
Key conventions - Admin-action auditing (triggered when admin deletes another user)
Key conventions - Logging (LogWarning on every Forbid() path)
Honest state - Done - authenticated-by-default fallback policy
Key conventions - both write immutable audit rows via the same new'd service→repo pattern
